Shared document where we can paste asymptote code that is used frequently

Also see Asymptote Style Guidefor best practices

Modifying a diagram from the library

Adding a diagram to the library

Footprint

Here be Dragons

How to Use

Modifying a diagram from the library

Use the table of contents to navigate and previews to decide if a pre-made diagram works for you. Click the “source” link.

Copy the code. Hit the “TeXeR” button in the top left, in the teal menu bar, wait for the page to load, and hit it again. This should give you a fresh window with a unique URL.

Paste the diagram, then modify it as needed.

Adding a diagram to the library

Make sure you have edit privileges. Mark E. can give them to you (eichenlaub@aops.com).

Go to the TeXeR (https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer). Optionally, choose a descriptive URL by typing it in place of the random letters in the address bar. E.g. go to https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/EMWaves3D if you are making a 3D drawing of electromagnetic waves.

Make your diagram in the TeXeR. Save it. Click “Make Public” on the far right of the top teal bar.

Copy an image of the output. In this doc, find the appropriate section, or make a new section. Title your drawing. Include the link to the TeXeR, your name as owner, and any other information you think people would want.

When you later use your own drawing, copy it, get a fresh TeXeR, and paste it there instead of editing the original, unless you are specifically updating the library entry, not just adapting the library entry for a particular use. This prevents you from accidentally changing the original.

Graphing

Blank Axes

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/blankgrid 

Owner: Mark E.

To Do:

  • Captions
  • Legend
  • Kill the zero on y axis if it’s forced to x = 0
  • Kill trailing decimals on zero

Notes: customizable

Unit Circle

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/puktlptf 

Owner: ecastner

Polar Coordinates

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/vbnqrmmu 

Owner: ecastner

Vectors

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/vectors 
Owner: Mark E.
To Do:

  • Make axis labels nicer
  • Auto-read grid size
  • Axes thicker

Notes: at the top, there’s a list of vectors. This will draw all of them.

Scatterplot template

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/scatter 

Owner: Mark E.

To Do:

  • modify the “blank axes” above to include data / plotting
  • add error bars
  • Add linear least squares regression calculated automatically
  • Allow the entire graph to be shifted
  • Allow a box on all four sides

Notes: customizable

(a) (b) (c) (d) (e) choices graphs

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/abcgraph 
Owner: Mark E.

To Do:

  • Update to graph package
  • Add tickmarks
  • Put the choices in a list and use the dimensions of the list to auto-place the pictures

Log scale

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/lkdiwqez 

Owner: Mark E.

Notes: I assume the graph package does this better and this should be deprecated, but just in case, here it is for now.

To Do: check into the graph package’s implementation and use that instead

Energy Bar Chart

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/ebarchart 
Owner: Mark E.
To Do:

  • Allow gridlines
  • Allow negative energies
  • Draw axes on all four sides
  • Test for robustness

Axes Labels for Graphing Motors

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/qlxnqysl 

Owner: Mark E.

Notes: DynamicGraph and Selectgraph motors, as of now, don’t include labels for the axes. This is a template to draw some labels. To use it, build a DynamicGraph or SelectGraph motor. Then use this template to generate axes. Render with BBCode, download the image, and upload it to AoPS servers. Then grab the url and use that as the background image in the motor. The axes labels should work assuming you set the axes in the motor to start at a small negative value. See motor 5f2b6741 for an example.

Drawing Elements

Measurement Devices

Scale

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/scale 

Owner: Mark E.

Notes: accepts argument for the weight

Simple Analog Clock

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/analogclock 

Owner: Mark E.

Notes: Only shows one hand. Accepts an argument for the angle of the hand from vertical, so clock(0) is noon, clock(90) is 3:00, etc.

Less Simple Analog Clock

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/analogclock2

Owner: Dan K.

Notes: Accepts arguments for the hours and minutes, and has arc arrows to illustrate clockwise and counterclockwise rotations

Ruler

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/pxyzsnad 

Owner: Unknown (Possibly Tom Shelly}

Meterstick

Source: https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/nyfpohvr 

Owner: Bryn

Here be Dragons

I haven’t looked at all the stuff below here much. I think it’s mainly the code from stuff above here, but this should be cleaned up at some point. - ME

https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/objects

//Atwood with n horizontal boxes, k vertical boxes, slopes phi, theta, masses m1, m2.

https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/atwood

//Atwood with n horizontal boxes, k vertical boxes, slopes phi, theta, masses m1, m2.

[asy]

unitsize(1.0 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 2, vboxes = 2;

real hmass = 1, vmass = 1;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta = 0, phi = 10; //set phi = 90 left side for vertical atwood, angles > 25 deg require tweaking.

real hdist = 0.3/(Cos(theta)); //adjust for spacing between right boxes

real vdist = 0.6/(Cos(phi)+1); //adjust for spacing between left boxes

real vyshift = phi/200; //adjust to place left box on ramp surface

real hyshift = theta/220;  //adjust to place right box on ramp surface

pair A, B, C, D; //box corners

pair Z, X, Y, M, N, F, G; //right triangle, right box, left triangle

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta), LL = 5*vboxes*vb*Cos(phi); //triangle hyp

//right side

real groundsize = 2.5; //extra vertical size of ground

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, groundsize*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+1bp);

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d;

if (phi == 90){

        d = vb;

    } else {

    d = 1/4;

}

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//left side

G = (0, Y.y - LL*Sin(phi));

F = (-LL*Cos(phi), Y.y - LL*Sin(phi));

pair K = (F.x, M.y);

filldraw(G--F--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(G--F--K--M--cycle,gray);

draw(F--G,gray+1bp);

draw(O -(0,hb)--M,gray+1bp);

path box;

//hboxes

x = 2;

draw(((x-hdist*hb)*Cos(theta),-(x-hdist*hb)*Sin(theta))--(R.x + r*Sin(theta),R.y +r*Cos(theta)),black+1pt);

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw(((x-hdist*hb)*Cos(theta),-(x-hdist*hb)*Sin(theta))--((x+hdist*hb)*Cos(theta),-(x+hdist*hb)*Sin(theta)),black+1pt);

    x = x + (hb+hdist)*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + hyshift - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + hyshift - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + hyshift + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + hyshift + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = x + (hb+hdist)*Cos(theta);

}

//vboxes

if (phi == 90){

    x = R.x - r;

    y = R.y - 3*vb;

    draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

    for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

        draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

        y = y - 2*vb;

        A = (x - vb, y - vb);

        B = (x + vb, y - vb);

        C = (x + vb, y + vb);

        D = (x - vb, y + vb);

        y = y - vb;

        filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

    }

} else {

    x = -2;

    y = 0;

    draw(((x+vdist*vb*vmass)*Cos(phi), (x+vdist*vb*vmass)*Sin(phi)+vyshift)--(R.x - r*Sin(phi),R.y + r*Cos(phi)),black+1pt);

    for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

        draw(((x-vdist*vb)*Cos(phi),(x-vdist*hb)*Sin(phi)+vyshift)--((x+vdist*hb)*Cos(phi),(x+vdist*vb)*Sin(phi)+vyshift),black+1pt);

        x = x - (vb+vdist)*Cos(phi);

        A = (x - vb, y + vyshift - vb);

        B = (x + vb, y + vyshift - vb);

        C = (x + vb, y + vyshift + vb);

        D = (x - vb, y + vyshift + vb);

        box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

        filldraw(rotate(phi)*box,lightgray);

        x = x - (vb+vdist)*Cos(phi);

    }

}

[/asy]

Boxes with strings.

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(18bp));

int bw = 1, bh = 1;

int x = 0, y = 0, nboxes = 5;

pair A, B, C, D;

//boxes

for (int i = 0; i < nboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + bw,y)--(x,y));

    x = x + 2*bw;

    A = (x - bw, y - bh);

    B = (x + bw, y - bh);

    C = (x + bw, y+bh);

    D = (x - bw, y + bh);

    x = x + bw;

        filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

draw((x,y+2*bh)--(x - 2*bw,y+2*bh),black+2bp,EndArrow);

label("$a$", (x,y+2*bh), E);

label("$A$",(1*bw/2,0),NW);

label("$B$",(7*bw/2,0),NW);

label("$C$",(13*bw/2,0),NW);

//dashbox

int nd = 2;

draw(B + (bw/2, -bh/2)--C + (bw/2, bh/2)--C + (bw/2 - 3*nd*bw, bh/2)--C + (bw/2 - 3*nd*bw, bh/2 - bh*3)--cycle,dashed+red+3bp);

//ground

//draw((a - 3*ls, b - ls)--(b + ls, b - ls), black+2bp);

//draw((a - 3*ls, b + ls/2)--(a - ls, b + ls /2), black+2bp);

//draw((a +ls/4, b - ls/2)--(a + ls, b - ls /2), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

//label("$F$",(a + ls, b - ls/2),E);

[/asy]

Scatter Plot

https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/ihyufwks

[asy]

unitsize(1.75mm);

defaultpen(fontsize(10pt));

pen dp=black+4;

//User entries

string xlabel = "Mass of Object (kg)";

string ylabel = "Magnitude of Horizontal Force (N)";

real xgrid = 40;

real xmax = 5;

real ygrid = 25;

real ymax = 25;

real xscale = xmax/xgrid;

real yscale = ymax/ygrid;

//Gridlines

for (real i=0; i<=xgrid; ++i) {

   draw((i,0)--(i,ygrid), mediumgray);

}

for (real i=0; i<=ygrid; ++i) {

   draw((0,i)--(xgrid,i), mediumgray);

}

//Axis labels

for (real i=1; i<=(xgrid/4); ++i){

    label("$"+string(4*i*xscale)+"$",((4*i),0),S, p=fontsize(8pt));

    draw((4*i,0)--(4*i,ygrid), mediumgray+1.5bp);

}

for (real i=1; i<=(ygrid/5); ++i){

    label("$"+string(5*i*yscale)+"$",(0,(5*i)), W, p=fontsize(8pt));

     draw((0,5*i)--(xgrid,5*i), mediumgray+1.5bp);

}

label("$0$", (0,0),SW, p=fontsize(8pt));

label(xlabel, ((xgrid/2), -3));

label(rotate(90)*ylabel, (-3, (ygrid/2)));

//Axes

draw((0,0)--((xgrid+1),0), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

draw((0,0)--(0,(ygrid+1)), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

//Data

dot(((0.52/xscale),(3.1/yscale)),dp);

dot(((1/xscale),(5.9/yscale)),dp);

dot(((1.5/xscale),(8.8/yscale)),dp);

dot(((2/xscale),(12.2/yscale)),dp);

dot(((2.5/xscale),(15/yscale)),dp);

dot(((3/xscale),(18.1/yscale)),dp);

dot(((3.5/xscale),(20.9/yscale)),dp);

[/asy]

Object on Inclined Plane Image

https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/htrkbrzz

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

//L = length of slope

//l = distance between box and foot of slope

//theta = angle of slope

//s = side length of box

real L = 5, l = 2.5, theta = 35, s = 0.5;

//A = foot of slope

//B = slope vertex with right angle

//C = peak of slope

//X = Box corner lowest on slope

//W, X, Y, Z = Box corners (listed in clockwise order)

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z;

real x = s*Sin(theta);

real y = s*Cos(theta);

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

Y = X + (-y,x);

W = X + (x,y);

Z = Y + (x,y);

filldraw(A--B--C--cycle,mediumgray);

label("$\theta$",A+(-0.75,0),NW);

filldraw(W--X--Y--Z--cycle,heavygray);

[/asy]

Object on Inclined Plane: Gravitational Force Components

https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/zjwftaux

[asy]

unitsize(2 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(14pt));

//L = length of slope

//l = distance between object and foot of slope

//theta = angle of slope

//F = length of force vector

real L = 5.5, l = 2.5, theta = 30, F = 2.25;

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z, M, N;

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

Y = X + (0,-F);

Z = (Y + reflect(A,C)*(Y))/2;

W = X + Y - Z;

M = interp(A,C,(1.4*l)/L) +(0,0.1);

N = interp(A,C,(1.2*l)/L) +(0,-0.1);

filldraw(A--B--C--cycle,gray,gray);

label("$\theta$",A+(-0.75,0),N);

draw(X--Y,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G,by~Earth}}$",Y,S);

dot((X),black+8bp);

//Force Components

draw(X--Z,red + dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, }\parallel}$",(X+Z)*0.5,NE,red);

draw(X--W,blue + dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, }\perp}$",W,S,blue);

draw(W--Y--Z,dotted);

draw(rightanglemark(X,W,Y,8));

draw(rightanglemark(X,Z,Y,8));

pair D, E, F;

D = X+(-1,-0.5);

E = foot(D,A,C);

F = foot(D,X,W);

draw(X--E,orange + dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{T, }\parallel}$",E,N,orange);

draw(X--F,green + dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{T, }\perp}$",F+(0,0.1),SW,green);

draw(E--D--F,dotted);

draw(rightanglemark(X,E,D,6));

draw(rightanglemark(X,F,D,6));

//Other Forces

draw(X--reflect(A,C)*W, EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N, by~ground}}$",reflect(A,C)*W,E);

draw(X--X+(-1,-0.5),EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{T, by~tether}}$",D,NW);

label("$\alpha$",X+(-0.1,0.15),SW);

[/asy]

Coil Spring

https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/fgraxsjw

[asy]

//theta = Angle of axis (relative to vertical)

//D = diameter of spring

//L = length of spring

//N = number of coils

//r = ratio of major/minor axes in ellipse

//A = location of spring bottom

real theta = 20;

real D = 0.25;

real L = 1;

real N = 15;

real r = 0.5;

pair A = (0,0);

real spacing = L/N;

real y = spacing*Cos(theta);

real x = spacing*Sin(theta);

for (int i = 0; i<N; ++i) {

  pair center = A + (i*x,i*y);

  path E = rotate(-theta,center)*ellipse(center,D,r*D);

  draw(E);

}

[/asy]

//Angles for streching

real theta_tor = 120;

real theta_a1 = 90 - theta_tor;

real theta_a2 = 90 - theta_tor - 50;

real theta_a3 = 90 - theta_tor + 70;

//real theta_a4 = 90 - theta_tor + 70;

real theta_a4 = angle_force;

real theta_l1 = 90 - theta_tor - 30;

real theta_l2 = 90 - theta_tor + 120;

real theta_l3 = 90 - theta_tor + 90;

real theta_l4 = 90 - theta_tor - 30;

real theta_h1 = 90 - theta_tor + 110;

real theta_f = 180;

DH = H + (hand*Cos(theta_h1), hand*Sin(theta_h1)); //connects hand to foot

draw(C--H--DH);

[asy]

unitsize(5.5mm);

defaultpen(fontsize(10pt));

label("Paul stretches",(-6,5));

//Paul

real angle_force = 30;

pair A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, DH;

real torso = 2.4;

real uarm = torso/1.8;

real larm = uarm*0.7;

real uleg = torso*2/3;

real lleg = uleg*0.7;

real hand = larm*0.2;

real head = torso/4;

real foot = lleg/3;

real theta_tor = 70;

real theta_a1 = -theta_tor + 10;

real theta_a2 = 90 - theta_tor + 0;

real theta_a3 = 90 - theta_tor + 70;

real theta_a4 = 90 - theta_tor + 120;

//real theta_a4 = angle_force;

real theta_l1 = 90 - theta_tor - 40;

real theta_l2 = 90 - theta_tor - 60;

real theta_l3 = 90 - theta_tor + 120;

real theta_l4 = 90 - theta_tor - 70;

real theta_h1 = 90 - theta_tor + 110;

real theta_f = 10;

A = (0, 0);

B = A + (torso*Cos(theta_tor), torso*Sin(theta_tor));

C = B + (uarm*Cos(theta_a1), uarm*Sin(theta_a1));

D = C + (larm*Cos(theta_a2), larm*Sin(theta_a1));

draw(A--B--C);

draw(C--D);

E = B - (uarm*Cos(theta_a3), uarm*Sin(theta_a3));

F = E - (larm*Cos(theta_a4), larm*Sin(theta_a4));

L = F + (hand*Cos(theta_f), hand*Sin(theta_f));

draw(B--E--F--L);

G = A + (uleg*Cos(theta_l1), uleg*Sin(theta_l1));

H = G + (lleg*Cos(theta_l2), lleg*Sin(theta_l2));

DH = H + (hand*Cos(theta_h1), hand*Sin(theta_h1));

draw(A--G--H);

//draw(C--H--DH);

I = A - (uleg*Cos(theta_l3), uleg*Sin(theta_l3));

J = I + (lleg*Cos(theta_l4), lleg*Sin(theta_l4));

K = J + (foot*Cos(theta_f), foot*Sin(theta_f));

draw(A--I--J--K);

draw(ellipse(B + (head*Cos(theta_tor),head), head, head));

label("$30^\circ $" ,L + (2.5,0),E,fontsize(9pt));

//Table

real thickn = 0.2;

real width = 5;

real legln = 3;

real legw = 0.2;

pair x;

x = (7.5,-0.3);

//filldraw(((-width, thickn) - x)--((-width, -thickn) - x)--((width, -thickn) - x)--((width, thickn) - x)--cycle,mediumgray);

//fill(((-width, thickn) - x)--((-width, -thickn) - x)--((width, -thickn) - x)--((width, thickn) - x)--cycle, mediumgray);

//for (int i = -1; i < 2; i = i +2)

//{

//    filldraw(((i*width, -thickn) - x)--((i*width, -thickn - legln) - x)--((i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln) - x)--((i*(width - //legw), -thickn) - x)--cycle,lightgray);

//    //fill((i*width, -thickn)--(i*width, -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn)--//cycle, lightgray);

//}

//ground

draw((0.5, -legln-0.05)--(-x.x - width - 1, -legln-0.05),black+2bp);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(5mm);

label("Table:",(-5,5));

//Table

real thickn = 0.2;

real width = 5;

real legln = 3;

real legw = 0.2;

draw((-width, thickn)--(-width, -thickn)--(width, -thickn)--(width, thickn)--cycle);

fill((-width, thickn)--(-width, -thickn)--(width, -thickn)--(width, thickn)--cycle, mediumgray);

for (int i = -1; i < 2; i = i +2)

{

    draw((i*width, -thickn)--(i*width, -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn)--cycle);

    fill((i*width, -thickn)--(i*width, -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn)--cycle, lightgray);

}

//Paul

real scale = legln*2/3;

real distance = 2;

real ground = -legln;

real foot = legln/3;

real lowerleg = foot*2.5;

real thigh = lowerleg;

real torsol = scale;

real headcenter = scale/2;

real arm = lowerleg/3;

real hand = arm/3;

//Back leg

draw((-width -distance - lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3));

draw((-width -distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3)--(-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg));

//Front leg

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3));

//Body

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2));

//Head

draw(ellipse((-width-distance, scale), 0.25*scale, 0.4*scale));

//Feet

draw((-width -distance -lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width -distance -lowerleg + foot*1/3, ground));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance + foot, ground + foot/4));

//Arms

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

//Hands

draw((-width -hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5 +hand/4));

draw((-width -hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot +hand/4));

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(5.5mm);

label("Paul and the bookcase:",(-9,14));

int x = -3;

int height = 2;

int width = 6;

int shelves = 3;

real thickn = 0.12;

real bookh = height*0.8;

int numbook = 16;

real bookw = bookh/5;

real bookplace = 2.3;

for (int k = 0; k < height*shelves; k = k + 1)

{

    draw((x - width/2, k*height)--(x + width/2, k*height)--(x + width/2, (k + 1)*height)--(x - width/2, (k + 1)*height)--cycle, brown+3bp);

}

for (int i; i < height*shelves; i = i + 1)

{

    for (int j = 0; j < numbook; j = j + 1)

    {

            draw((x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + (j + 1)*bookw + thickn, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + (j + 1)*bookw, i*height + bookh)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + bookh)--cycle, black +1.5bp);

        fill((x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + (j + 1)*bookw + thickn, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + (j + 1)*bookw, i*height + bookh)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + bookh)--cycle, lightgray);

    }

}

//Paul

real scale = height*shelves*2/3;

real distance = 2;

real ground = 0;

real foot = scale/3;

real lowerleg = foot*2.5;

real thigh = lowerleg;

real torsol = scale;

real headcenter = scale/2;

real arm = lowerleg/3;

real hand = arm/3;

//Back leg

draw((-width -distance - lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3));

draw((-width -distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3)--(-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg));

//Front leg

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3));

//Body

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2));

//Head

draw(ellipse((-width-distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol), 0.25*scale, 0.26*scale));

//Feet

draw((-width -distance -lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width -distance -lowerleg + foot*1/3, ground));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance + foot, ground + foot/4));

//Arms

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

//Hands

draw((-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5 +hand/4));

draw((-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot +hand/4));

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real L = 6, L2 = L*3/4, theta = 25;

pair X = (0,0), Z = (X.x, L*Sin(theta)), X2 = (X.x + L, X.y);

filldraw(X--X2--Z--cycle, mediumgray);

draw(X2--(X2 + (L2, 0)),heavygray);

draw(X2--Z,mediumgray);

//draw((X2 - (0, 0.02))--(X2 - (-L2, 0.02)), heavygray+2bp);

real angle_force = 30;

pair A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, DH, M,S1,S2;

real torso = 0.6;

real uarm = torso/1.8;

real larm = uarm*0.7;

real uleg = torso*2/3;

real lleg = uleg*0.7;

real hand = larm*0.2;

real head = torso/4;

real foot = lleg/3;

real theta_tor = 85;

real theta_a1 = -theta_tor + 5;

real theta_a2 = 90 - theta_tor + 10;

real theta_a3 = 90 - theta_tor + 85;

real theta_a4 = 90 - theta_tor + 120;

//real theta_a4 = angle_force;

real theta_l1 = 90 - theta_tor - 10;

real theta_l2 = 90 - theta_tor - 50;

real theta_l3 = 90 - theta_tor + 160;

real theta_l4 = 90 - theta_tor - 70;

real theta_h1 = 90 - theta_tor + 110;

real theta_f = 10;

A = Z +(0.2, 0);

B = A + (torso*Cos(theta_tor), torso*Sin(theta_tor));

C = B + (uarm*Cos(theta_a1), uarm*Sin(theta_a1));

D = C + (larm*Cos(theta_a2), larm*Sin(theta_a1));

draw(A--B--C--(D - (0.1, 0)));

E = B - (uarm*Cos(theta_a3), uarm*Sin(theta_a3));

F = E - (larm*Cos(theta_a4), larm*Sin(theta_a4));

L = F + (hand*Cos(theta_f), hand*Sin(theta_f));

draw(B--E--F--L);

//Snow scoot

S1 = Z + (0, 0.2);

S2 = A + (0.35, -0.2);

draw(S1--(Z + (0.1, 0.01))--S2,blue+1.2bp );

draw(S2--L, blue);

G = A + (uleg*Cos(theta_l1), uleg*Sin(theta_l1));

H = G + (lleg*Cos(theta_l2), lleg*Sin(theta_l2));

DH = H + (hand*Cos(theta_h1), hand*Sin(theta_h1));

M = H + (foot*Cos(theta_f), foot*Sin(theta_f));

draw(A--G--H--M);

//draw(C--H--DH);

I = A - (uleg*Cos(theta_l3), uleg*Sin(theta_l3));

J = I + (lleg*Cos(theta_l4), lleg*Sin(theta_l4));

K = J + (foot*Cos(theta_f), foot*Sin(theta_f));

draw(A--I--J--K);

draw(ellipse(B + (head*Cos(theta_tor),head), head, head));

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(5.5mm);

defaultpen(fontsize(10pt));

label("Paul in an elevator",(-6,5));

//Paul

real angle_force = 30;

pair A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, L2, DH,M;

real torso = 2.4;

real uarm = torso/1.8;

real larm = uarm*0.7;

real uleg = torso*2/3;

real lleg = uleg*0.7;

real hand = larm*0.2;

real head = torso/3.5;

real foot = lleg/3;

real theta_tor = 90;

real theta_a1 = -theta_tor + 40;

real theta_a2 = 90 - theta_tor - 130;

real theta_a3 = 90 - theta_tor + 50;

real theta_a4 = 90 - theta_tor + 130;

//real theta_a4 = angle_force;

real theta_l1 = 90 - theta_tor - 65;

real theta_l2 = 90 - theta_tor - 70;

real theta_l3 = 90 - theta_tor + 65;

real theta_l4 = 90 - theta_tor - 105;

real theta_h1 = 90 - theta_tor + 200;

real theta_h2 = 90 - theta_tor - 30;

real theta_f = 190;

real theta_f2 = -10;

A = (0, 0);

B = A + (torso*Cos(theta_tor), torso*Sin(theta_tor));

C = B + (uarm*Cos(theta_a1), uarm*Sin(theta_a1));

D = C + (larm*Cos(theta_a2), larm*Sin(theta_a1));

L2 = D + (hand*Cos(theta_h2), hand*Sin(theta_h2));

draw(A--B--C--D--L2);

E = B - (uarm*Cos(theta_a3), uarm*Sin(theta_a3));

F = E - (larm*Cos(theta_a4), larm*Sin(theta_a4));

L = F + (hand*Cos(theta_h1), hand*Sin(theta_h1));

draw(B--E--F--L);

G = A + (uleg*Cos(theta_l1), uleg*Sin(theta_l1));

H = G + (lleg*Cos(theta_l2), lleg*Sin(theta_l2));

DH = H + (hand*Cos(theta_h1), hand*Sin(theta_h1));

M = H + (foot*Cos(theta_f2), foot*Sin(theta_f2));

draw(A--G--H--M);

//draw(C--H--DH);

I = A - (uleg*Cos(theta_l3), uleg*Sin(theta_l3));

J = I + (lleg*Cos(theta_l4), lleg*Sin(theta_l4));

K = J + (foot*Cos(theta_f), foot*Sin(theta_f));

draw(A--I--J--K);

draw(ellipse(B + (head*Cos(theta_tor),head), head, head));

//Table

real thickn = 0.2;

real width = 5;

real legln = 3;

real legw = 0.2;

pair x;

x = (7.5,-0.3);

//filldraw(((-width, thickn) - x)--((-width, -thickn) - x)--((width, -thickn) - x)--((width, thickn) - x)--cycle,mediumgray);

//fill(((-width, thickn) - x)--((-width, -thickn) - x)--((width, -thickn) - x)--((width, thickn) - x)--cycle, mediumgray);

//for (int i = -1; i < 2; i = i +2)

//{

//    filldraw(((i*width, -thickn) - x)--((i*width, -thickn - legln) - x)--((i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln) - x)--((i*(width - //legw), -thickn) - x)--cycle,lightgray);

//    //fill((i*width, -thickn)--(i*width, -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn)--//cycle, lightgray);

//}

//Scale

real scalex = 3, scaley = 0.5;

pair ScA = A + (-scalex/2,K.y - 0.1), ScB = ScA - (0, scaley), ScC = ScB + (scalex, 0), ScD = ScC + (0, scaley);

draw(ScA--ScB--ScC--ScD--cycle,black+1bp);

//Elevator

real elx = 4, ely = 10;

pair elA = A + (-elx/2,A.y + ScB.y), elB = elA + (elx, 0), elC = elB + (0, ely), elD = elC - (elx, 0);

draw(elA--elB--elC--elD--cycle,black+3bp);

draw(A + (0.5,ely/2+5)--A + (0.5,ely/2+3),EndArrow);

label("$a$" , A + (1.2,ely/2+3.6),E,fontsize(9pt));

draw(A + (-0.5,ely/2+3)--A + (-0.5,ely/2+5),EndArrow);

label("$v$" , A + (-0.8,ely/2+4),W,fontsize(9pt));

label("$v = 10 \; \mathrm{m/s}$" ,A + (-0,ely/2),N,fontsize(9pt));

label("$a = 0.5 \; \mathrm{m/s} $" , A + (-0/4,ely/2),S,fontsize(9pt));

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(5mm);

label("Table:",(-5,5));

//Table

real thickn = 0.2;

real width = 5;

real legln = 3;

real legw = 0.2;

draw((-width, thickn)--(-width, -thickn)--(width, -thickn)--(width, thickn)--cycle);

fill((-width, thickn)--(-width, -thickn)--(width, -thickn)--(width, thickn)--cycle, mediumgray);

for (int i = -1; i < 2; i = i +2)

{

    draw((i*width, -thickn)--(i*width, -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn)--cycle);

    fill((i*width, -thickn)--(i*width, -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn - legln)--(i*(width - legw), -thickn)--cycle, lightgray);

}

//Paul

real scale = legln*2/3;

real distance = 2;

real ground = -legln;

real foot = legln/3;

real lowerleg = foot*2.5;

real thigh = lowerleg;

real torsol = scale;

real headcenter = scale/2;

real arm = lowerleg/3;

real hand = arm/3;

//Back leg

draw((-width -distance - lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3));

draw((-width -distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3)--(-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg));

//Front leg

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3));

//Body

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2));

//Head

draw(ellipse((-width-distance, scale), 0.25*scale, 0.4*scale));

//Feet

draw((-width -distance -lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width -distance -lowerleg + foot*1/3, ground));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance + foot, ground + foot/4));

//Arms

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

//Hands

draw((-width -hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5 +hand/4));

draw((-width -hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot +hand/4));

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(5.5mm);

label("Paul and the bookcase:",(-9,14));

int x = -3;

int height = 2;

int width = 6;

int shelves = 3;

real thickn = 0.12;

real bookh = height*0.8;

int numbook = 16;

real bookw = bookh/5;

real bookplace = 2.3;

for (int k = 0; k < height*shelves; k = k + 1)

{

    draw((x - width/2, k*height)--(x + width/2, k*height)--(x + width/2, (k + 1)*height)--(x - width/2, (k + 1)*height)--cycle, brown+3bp);

}

for (int i; i < height*shelves; i = i + 1)

{

    for (int j = 0; j < numbook; j = j + 1)

    {

            draw((x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + (j + 1)*bookw + thickn, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + (j + 1)*bookw, i*height + bookh)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + bookh)--cycle, black +1.5bp);

        fill((x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + (j + 1)*bookw + thickn, i*height + thickn)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + (j + 1)*bookw, i*height + bookh)--(x - width/bookplace + thickn + j*bookw, i*height + bookh)--cycle, lightgray);

    }

}

//Paul

real scale = height*shelves*2/3;

real distance = 2;

real ground = 0;

real foot = scale/3;

real lowerleg = foot*2.5;

real thigh = lowerleg;

real torsol = scale;

real headcenter = scale/2;

real arm = lowerleg/3;

real hand = arm/3;

//Back leg

draw((-width -distance - lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3));

draw((-width -distance - foot, ground + lowerleg*2/3)--(-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg));

//Front leg

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + lowerleg*4/5)--(-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3));

//Body

draw((-width - distance - foot/2, ground + lowerleg)--(-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2));

//Head

draw(ellipse((-width-distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol), 0.25*scale, 0.26*scale));

//Feet

draw((-width -distance -lowerleg, ground + foot/3)--(-width -distance -lowerleg + foot*1/3, ground));

draw((-width - distance + foot/2, ground + foot/3)--(-width - distance + foot, ground + foot/4));

//Arms

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot/5)--(-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5));

draw((-width - distance + arm, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot));

//Hands

draw((-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot*4/5 +hand/4));

draw((-width - hand, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot)--(-width, ground + lowerleg + torsol-headcenter/2 - foot +hand/4));

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(5mm);

label("Curling stone:",(-6,6));

//Ground

draw((-15, 0)--(-5,0),black+2bp);

//Stone

filldraw(ellipse((-10, 1), 2,1), mediumgray);

draw((-12,1)--(-14,1),EndArrow);

label("v", (-14,2),NE);

//Forces

draw((0,0)--(0,4),EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N, by~ground}}$", (0.1,4),N);

draw((0,0)--(3,0),red,EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{KF, by~ground}}$", (3,0),E);

draw((0,0)--(0,-4),EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, by~Earth}}$", (0,-4),S);

//Object

dot((0,0),black+5bp);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(5mm);

label("Magnet:",(-5,5));

//Door

draw((-12, 3)--(-12,-3),black+2bp);

//Magnet

draw((-13, 1)--(-13, -1)--(-12, -1)--(-12, 1)--cycle);

fill((-13, 1)--(-13, -1)--(-12.1, -1)--(-12.1, 1)--cycle, mediumgray);

//Forces

draw((0,0)--(0,2),red,EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{SF, by~fridge}}$", (0.1,2),N);

draw((0,0)--(4,0),EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{by~magnet}}$", (4,0),E);

draw((0,0)--(-4,0),EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N, by~fridge}}$", (-8,0),E);

draw((0,0)--(0,-2),EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, by~Earth}}$", (0,-2),S);

//Object

dot((0,0),black+5bp);

[/asy]

//lens

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(8pt));

pair X = (0,0), G1, G2, T1, T2, TC1, TC2, G3, G4, GT1, GT2, RG = X - (0, 2), T;

real r = 2, t = 1;

dot(X);

label("$\mathrm{O}$", X, NE);

draw(circle(X,r));

G1 = X - (r,r);

G2 =  X - (-r,r);

T1 = X - (r,r - t);

T2 = X - (-r, r - t);

draw(G1--G2);

draw(T1--T2, dashed);

TC1 = intersectionpoint(circle(X,r), (X - (0, t))--T1);

TC2 = intersectionpoint(circle(X,r), (X - (0, t))--T2);

G3 = TC1 - (0, t);

G4 = TC2 - (0, t);

draw((TC1 + (0, 1))--G3, dashed);

draw((TC2 + (0, 1))--G4, dashed);

label("$\mathrm{t}$", T1 - (0,0.4), SE,fontsize(10pt));

GT1 = intersectionpoint(TC1--G3, G1--G2);

GT2 = intersectionpoint(TC2--G4, G1--G2);

draw(TC1--X, dashed);

draw(TC2--X, dashed);

draw(X--RG,dashed);

T = intersectionpoint(X--RG, T1--T2);

dot(T);

label("$\mathrm{T}$", T, SE);

label("$\mathrm{r}$", T - (1,0), SE,fontsize(10pt));

label("$\mathrm{r}$", T + (1,0), SW,fontsize(10pt));

label("$\mathrm{a}$", T - (0.8,-0.5), NW,fontsize(10pt));

label("$\mathrm{a - t}$", T + (0, t/2), E);

[/asy]

//Mirror

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real L = 5, l = 1, y = 0.9;

pair S = (0,0), Sl = S - (l, 0), SL = S + (L,0), yn = (SL + (0, y)), yln = (Sl + (0, y/5));

dot(S,black+4bp);

draw((Sl + (0,1))--(Sl + (0, -2)), black+3bp);

draw(Sl--SL + (0.7,0),dashed,EndArrow);

draw((SL + (0,1))--(SL + (0, -2)), black+2bp);

draw((SL + (0, -2))--(SL + (0,1.5)),dashed,EndArrow);

draw((S -(0, 0.4))--(S - (0,2)));

draw((Sl - (0, 1.7))--(S - (0, 1.7)),Arrows);

draw((S - (0, 1.7))--(SL - (0, 1.7)),Arrows);

draw(S--yn, dashed);

draw(S--yln, dashed);

draw(yln--(yn + (0, 2*yln.y) + (0, 0.1)), dashed);

draw(S--(S + (-0.06, 0.3)),dashed);

label("$\mathrm{S}$", S - (0, 0.2), S);

label("$\mathrm{\alpha}$", S + (1.2, 0), NE);

label("$\mathrm{a}$", S - (0.3, -0.4), NW);

label("$\mathrm{L}$", S - (-L/2, 2), S);

label("$\mathrm{l}$", S - (l/2, 2 + 0.2), S);

[/asy]

//Atwood

[asy]

unitsize(1.0 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 3, vboxes = 2;

real hmass = 1.0, vmass = 1;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta = 15;

pair A, B, C, D;

pair Z, X, Y, M, N;

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 3.5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta);

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, 3*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+2bp);

//filldraw((0,-hb)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)-(0, 5*vboxes*vb)--(0,B.y-5*vboxes*vb)--cycle,gray);

path box;

//hboxes

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + hb*Cos(theta),-(x + hb*Cos(theta))*Sin(theta))--(x,y - x*Sin(theta)),black+1bp);

    x = x + 2*hb*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = (x + hb)*Cos(theta);

}

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d = vb;

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//vboxes

real x = R.x - r;

real y = R.y - 3*vb;

draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

    y = y - 2*vb;

    A = (x - vb, y - vb);

    B = (x + vb, y - vb);

    C = (x + vb, y+vb);

    D = (x - vb, y + vb);

    y = y - vb;

          filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(18bp));

int bw = 1, bh = 1;

int x = 0, y = 0, nboxes = 5;

pair A, B, C, D;

//boxes

for (int i = 0; i < nboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + bw,y)--(x,y));

    x = x + 2*bw;

    A = (x - bw, y - bh);

    B = (x + bw, y - bh);

    C = (x + bw, y+bh);

    D = (x - bw, y + bh);

    x = x + bw;

        filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

draw((x,y+2*bh)--(x - 2*bw,y+2*bh),black+2bp,EndArrow);

label("$a$", (x,y+2*bh), E);

label("$A$",(1*bw/2,0),NW);

label("$B$",(7*bw/2,0),NW);

label("$C$",(13*bw/2,0),NW);

//dashbox

int nd = 2;

draw(B + (bw/2, -bh/2)--C + (bw/2, bh/2)--C + (bw/2 - 3*nd*bw, bh/2)--C + (bw/2 - 3*nd*bw, bh/2 - bh*3)--cycle,dashed+red+3bp);

//ground

//draw((a - 3*ls, b - ls)--(b + ls, b - ls), black+2bp);

//draw((a - 3*ls, b + ls/2)--(a - ls, b + ls /2), black+2bp);

//draw((a +ls/4, b - ls/2)--(a + ls, b - ls /2), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

//label("$F$",(a + ls, b - ls/2),E);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

int ls = 1;

int ll = 2;

int a = 0;

int b = 0;

//boxes

draw((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle,black+2bp);

fill((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle, lightgray);

label("$m$",(a - ls*3/4, b + ls/2),E);

draw((a, b + ls)--(a + ls, b + ls)--(a + ls, b - ll)--(a, b - ll)--cycle, black+2bp);

fill((a, b + ls)--(a + ls, b + ls)--(a + ls, b - ll)--(a, b - ll)--cycle, lightgray);

label("$M$",(a + ls/4, b - ll/4),E);

//ground

draw((a - ls, b - ll)--(b + 2*ls, b - ll), black+2bp);

draw((a - 2*ls, b + ls/2)--(a - ls, b + ls /2), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

label("$F$",(a - 2.4*ls, b + ls/2),E);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

int ls = 1;

real ll = 1.2;

int a = 0;

int b = 0;

//boxes

draw((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle,black+2bp);

fill((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle, lightgray);

label("$A$",(a - ls*3/4, b + ls/2),E);

draw((a - ls*ll, b - ls)--(a +ls/4, b - ls)--(a+ls/4, b)--(a - ls*ll, b)--cycle, black+2bp);

fill((a - ls*ll, b - ls)--(a +ls/4, b - ls)--(a+ls/4, b)--(a - ls*ll, b)--cycle,lightgray);

label("$B$",(a - ls*ll*0.6, b - ll/3),E);

//ground

draw((a - 3*ls, b - ls)--(b + ls, b - ls), black+2bp);

draw((a - 3*ls, b - ls)--(a - 3*ls, b + ls), black+2bp);

draw((a - 3*ls, b + ls/2)--(a - ls, b + ls /2), black+2bp);

draw((a +ls/4, b - ls/2)--(a + ls, b - ls /2), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

label("$F$",(a + ls, b - ls/2),E);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

int ls = 1;

int ll = 2;

int a = 0;

int b = 0;

//boxes

draw((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle,black+2bp);

fill((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle, lightgray);

label("$m$",(a - ls*3/4, b + ls/2),E);

draw((a, b + ls)--(a + ls, b + ls)--(a + ls, b - ll)--(a, b - ll)--cycle, black+2bp);

fill((a, b + ls)--(a + ls, b + ls)--(a + ls, b - ll)--(a, b - ll)--cycle, lightgray);

label("$M$",(a + ls/4, b - ll/4),E);

//ground

draw((a - ls, b - ll)--(b + 2*ls, b - ll), black+2bp);

draw((a - 2*ls, b + ls/2)--(a - ls, b + ls /2), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

label("$F$",(a - 2.4*ls, b + ls/2),E);

[/asy]

//Double ramp with boxes

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

//L = length of slope

//l = distance between box and foot of slope

//theta = angle of slope

//s = side length of box

real L = 5, l = 2.5, theta = 27, theta2 =40, s = 0.5;

//A = foot of slope

//B = slope vertex with right angle

//C = peak of slope

//X = Box corner lowest on slope

//W, X, Y, Z = Box corners (listed in clockwise order)

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z, A2, W2, X2, Y2, Z2;

real x = s*Sin(theta);

real y = s*Cos(theta);

real x2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real y2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real l2 = L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2);

real L2 = L*Sin(theta)/Sin(theta2);

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

A2 = ((-L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2)),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

X2 = interp(A2, C,1/L2);

Y = X + (-s*Cos(theta),s*Sin(theta));

Y2 = X2 + (s*Cos(theta2),s*Sin(theta2));

W = X + (x,y);

W2 = X2 + (-x2,y2);

Z = Y + (x,y);

Z2 = Y2 + (-x2,y2);

filldraw(A2--A--C--cycle,mediumgray);

label("$27.0^\circ$",A+(-0.5,0),NW);

filldraw(W--X--Y--Z--cycle,heavygray);

label(rotate(-27, (Z))*"$M$",Z + (s/3,0),E);

label("$40.0^\circ$",A2+(1.5*0.75,0),NW);

filldraw(W2--X2--Y2--Z2--cycle,heavygray);

label(rotate(40, (Z))*"$M$",Z2 + (-s, 0),E);

draw(C,B,mediumgray+2bp);

//Spring system

real wheelsz = s/4;

real disp = 1 + wheelsz;

filldraw(ellipse(C+(0, wheelsz), wheelsz, wheelsz), gray);

//draw((C*disp)-(wheelsz,0)--C);

draw(C + (0.05, 2*wheelsz)--(Z+Y)/2);

draw(C + (-0.05, 2*wheelsz)--(Z2+Y2)/2);

//draw(C + (-0.05, 2*wheelsz)--((-1,1)*(Z+Y)/2+(Z+Y)*(1,0)/2));

[/asy]

//Double ramp with boxes

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

//L = length of slope

//l = distance between box and foot of slope

//theta = angle of slope

//s = side length of box

real L = 5, l = 2.5, theta = 27, theta2 =40, s = 0.5;

//A = foot of slope

//B = slope vertex with right angle

//C = peak of slope

//X = Box corner lowest on slope

//W, X, Y, Z = Box corners (listed in clockwise order)

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z, A2, W2, X2, Y2, Z2;

real x = s*Sin(theta);

real y = s*Cos(theta);

real x2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real y2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real l2 = L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2);

real L2 = L*Sin(theta)/Sin(theta2);

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

A2 = ((-L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2)),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

X2 = interp(A2, C,1/L2);

Y = X + (-s*Cos(theta),s*Sin(theta));

Y2 = X2 + (s*Cos(theta2),s*Sin(theta2));

W = X + (x,y);

W2 = X2 + (-x2,y2);

Z = Y + (x,y);

Z2 = Y2 + (-x2,y2);

draw(A2--A--C--cycle,dashed);

label("$27.0^\circ$",A+(-0.5,0),NW);

//filldraw(W--X--Y--Z--cycle,heavygray);

label("$40.0^\circ$",A2+(1.5*0.75,0),NW);

//filldraw(W2--X2--Y2--Z2--cycle,heavygray);

draw(C,B,mediumgray+2bp);

//Spring system

real wheelsz = s/4;

real disp = 1 + wheelsz;

//forces

pair P = interp(A,C,(1.5*l)/L);

pair P2 = interp(A,C,(1.8*l)/L);

pair P3 = interp(A2,C,(1.3*l)/L);

pair P4 = interp(A2,C,(1.6*l)/L);

dot((Y),black+8bp);

dot((Y2),black+8bp);

draw(Y--P, EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{SF_B, by~ramp}}$", P + (-0.2,-0.5),N);

draw(Y--P2, red, EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{T, by~rope}}$", P2 + (0.6,-0.1),N,red);

draw(Y--Y-(0, 1), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, by~earth}}$", Y - (-0.7, 1),N);

draw(Y2--Y2-(0, 1), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, by~earth}}$", Y2 - (-0.7, 1),N);

draw(Y--Y+(Sin(theta), Cos(theta)), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N_B, by~ramp}}$", Y+(Sin(theta) + 0, Cos(theta)) + 0.5 ,N);

draw(Y2--Y2+(-Sin(theta2), Cos(theta2)), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N_A, by~ramp}}$", Y2+(-Sin(theta2) - 0.6, Cos(theta2) - 0.4) ,N);

draw(Y2--P3, EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{SF_A, by~ramp}}$", P3 + (0.45,-0.6),N);

draw(Y2--P4, red+2pt, EndArrow(7pt));

label("$F_{\mathrm{T, by~rope}}$", P3 - (0.1,-0.4),N,red);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(10pt));

real L = 5, l = 2.5, theta = 27, theta2 =40, s = 0.5;

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z, A2, W2, X2, Y2, Z2;

real x = s*Sin(theta);

real y = s*Cos(theta);

real x2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real y2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real l2 = L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2);

real L2 = L*Sin(theta)/Sin(theta2);

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

A2 = ((-L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2)),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

X2 = interp(A2, C,1/L2);

Y = X + (-s*Cos(theta),s*Sin(theta));

Y2 = X2 + (s*Cos(theta2),s*Sin(theta2));

W = X + (x,y);

W2 = X2 + (-x2,y2);

Z = Y + (x,y);

Z2 = Y2 + (-x2,y2);

//forces

pair P = interp(A,C,(1.5*l)/L);

pair P2 = interp(A,C,(1.8*l)/L);

pair P3 = interp(A2,C,(1.3*l)/L);

pair P4 = interp(A2,C,(1.6*l)/L);

dot((Y2),black+8bp);

draw(Y2--Y2-(0, 1), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, by~earth}}$", Y2 - (-0.5, 1.4),N);

draw(Y2--Y2+(-Sin(theta2), Cos(theta2)), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N_A, by~ramp}}$", Y2+(-Sin(theta2) - 0.6, Cos(theta2) - 0.4) ,N);

draw(Y2--P4, red+1.3pt, EndArrow(3.5pt));

label("$F_{\mathrm{T, by~rope}}$", P3 - (0.1,-0.4),N,red);

draw(Y2--P3, EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{SF_A, by~ramp}}$", P3 + (0.45,-0.6),N);

//components

pair Z = (Y2 + (Sin(theta2), -Cos(theta2))*0.75);

pair ZZ = Y2 + (-Cos(theta2), -Sin(theta2))*0.65;

draw(Y2--Z,blue+dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{G,\perp}$",Y2 + (0.5, -0.9) ,NE,blue);

draw((Y2 - (0,1))--Z,black+dashed);

draw((Y2 - (0,1))--ZZ,black+dashed);

draw(Y2---ZZ,blue+dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{G,||}$",ZZ,NW,blue);

//draw(rightanglemark(X,W,Y));

//draw(rightanglemark(X,Z,Y));

//draw(W--Y--Z,dashed);

//label("$F_{G,||}$",(Y+W)*0.5,SW,red);

//label("$F_{G,\perp}$",(Y+Z)*0.5,SE,blue);

//draw(A--X--foot(X,A,B)--cycle,heavygreen);

//draw(rightanglemark(A,foot(X,A,B),X),heavygreen);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(10pt));

real L = 5, l = 2.5, theta = 27, theta2 =40, s = 0.5;

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z, A2, W2, X2, Y2, Z2;

real x = s*Sin(theta);

real y = s*Cos(theta);

real x2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real y2 = s*Sin(theta2);

real l2 = L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2);

real L2 = L*Sin(theta)/Sin(theta2);

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

A2 = ((-L*Sin(theta)/Tan(theta2)),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

X2 = interp(A2, C,1/L2);

Y = X + (-s*Cos(theta),s*Sin(theta));

Y2 = X2 + (s*Cos(theta2),s*Sin(theta2));

W = X + (x,y);

W2 = X2 + (-x2,y2);

Z = Y + (x,y);

Z2 = Y2 + (-x2,y2);

//forces

pair P = interp(A,C,(1.5*l)/L);

pair P2 = interp(A,C,(1.8*l)/L);

pair P3 = interp(A2,C,(1.3*l)/L);

pair P4 = interp(A2,C,(1.6*l)/L);

dot((Y),black+8bp);

//components

pair Z2 = (Y + (-Sin(theta), -Cos(theta))*0.87);

pair ZZ2 = Y + (Cos(theta), -Sin(theta))*0.5;

draw(Y--Z2,blue+dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{G,\perp}$",Z2 - (0.7, 0) ,NE,blue);

draw((Y - (0,1))--Z2,black+dashed);

draw((Y - (0,1))--ZZ2,black+dashed);

draw(Y---ZZ2,blue+dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{G,||}$",ZZ2 + (0.4,0),NW,blue);

draw(Y--P2, red+1.3pt, EndArrow(3.5pt));

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, by~earth}}$", Y - (-0.7, 1),N);

label("$F_{\mathrm{T, by~rope}}$", P2 + (0.6,-0.1),N,red);

draw(Y--P, EndArrow);

draw(Y--Y-(0, 1), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{SF_B, by~ramp}}$", P + (-0.2,-0.5),N);

draw(Y--Y+(Sin(theta), Cos(theta)), EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N_B, by~ramp}}$", Y+(Sin(theta) + 0, Cos(theta)) + 0.5 ,N);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(10pt));

//L = length of slope

//l = distance between object and foot of slope

//theta = angle of slope

//F = length of force vector

real L = 5, l = 4, theta = 17, F = 2.25;

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z, M, N;

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

Y = X + (0,-F);

Z = (Y + reflect(A,C)*(Y))/2;

W = X + Y - Z;

M = interp(A,C,(1.4*l)/L) +(0,0.1);

N = interp(A,C,(1.2*l)/L) +(0,-0.1);

filldraw(A--B--C--cycle,gray,gray);

label("$17.0^\circ$",A+(-1.25,0),N);

draw(X--Y,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G,by~Earth}}$",Y+(0,0.3*F),SE);

//Force Components

draw(X--Z,red + dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, }\parallel}$",(X+Z)*0.5,NE,red);

draw(X--W,blue + dashed,Arrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{G, }\perp}$",W,S,blue);

draw(W--Y--Z,dotted);

draw(rightanglemark(X,W,Y,8));

draw(rightanglemark(X,Z,Y,8));

//Other Forces

draw(X--reflect(A,C)*W, EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{N, by~ground}}$",reflect(A,C)*W,E);

pair D = reflect(X,W)*Z;

D = interp(X,D,0.7);

draw(X--D, EndArrow);

label("$F_{\mathrm{KF, by~ground}}$",D,NW);

dot((X),black+6bp);

draw(X--A--foot(X, A, B)--cycle, dashed+green);

label("$73.0^\circ$", X+(0,-0.1), SE, green+fontsize(6pt));

//draw(X--Y--Z--cycle, dashed+magenta);

[/asy]

\begin{tabular}{|p{6cm}|p{6cm}|}

\hline

\begin{minipage}{5cm}

\vspace{2mm}

\begin{center}\textbf{A}\end{center}

\vspace{2mm}

[asy]

unitsize(0.3cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 2, vboxes = 3;

real hmass = 1.0, vmass = 1;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta = 10;

pair A, B, C, D;

pair Z, X, Y, M, N;

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 3.5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta);

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, 3*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+2bp);

//filldraw((0,-hb)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)-(0, 5*vboxes*vb)--(0,B.y-5*vboxes*vb)--cycle,gray);

path box;

//hboxes

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + hb*Cos(theta),-(x + hb*Cos(theta))*Sin(theta))--(x,y - x*Sin(theta)),black+1bp);

    x = x + 2*hb*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + +0.03 + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = (x + hb)*Cos(theta);

}

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d = vb;

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//vboxes

real x = R.x - r;

real y = R.y - 3*vb;

draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

    y = y - 2*vb;

    A = (x - vb, y - vb);

    B = (x + vb, y - vb);

    C = (x + vb, y+vb);

    D = (x - vb, y + vb);

    y = y - vb;

          filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

[/asy]

\end{minipage}

&

\begin{minipage}{5cm}

\vspace{2mm}

\begin{center}\textbf{A}\end{center}

\vspace{2mm}

[asy]

unitsize(0.3cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 2, vboxes = 4;

real hmass = 1.0, vmass = 0.6;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta = 0;

pair A, B, C, D;

pair Z, X, Y, M, N;

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 3.5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta);

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, 3*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+2bp);

//filldraw((0,-hb)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)-(0, 5*vboxes*vb)--(0,B.y-5*vboxes*vb)--cycle,gray);

path box;

//hboxes

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + hb*Cos(theta),-(x + hb*Cos(theta))*Sin(theta))--(x,y - x*Sin(theta)),black+1bp);

    x = x + 2*hb*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + +0.03 + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = (x + hb)*Cos(theta);

}

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d = vb;

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//vboxes

real x = R.x - r;

real y = R.y - 3*vb;

draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

    y = y - 2*vb;

    A = (x - vb, y - vb);

    B = (x + vb, y - vb);

    C = (x + vb, y+vb);

    D = (x - vb, y + vb);

    y = y - vb;

          filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

[/asy]

\end{minipage}\\

\hline

\begin{minipage}{5cm}

\vspace{2mm}

\begin{center}\textbf{A}\end{center}

\vspace{2mm}

[asy]

unitsize(0.3cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 3, vboxes = 2;

real hmass = 1.0, vmass = 1;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta = 0;

pair A, B, C, D;

pair Z, X, Y, M, N;

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 3.5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta);

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, 3*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+2bp);

//filldraw((0,-hb)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)-(0, 5*vboxes*vb)--(0,B.y-5*vboxes*vb)--cycle,gray);

path box;

//hboxes

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + hb*Cos(theta),-(x + hb*Cos(theta))*Sin(theta))--(x,y - x*Sin(theta)),black+1bp);

    x = x + 2*hb*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + +0.03 + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = (x + hb)*Cos(theta);

}

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d = vb;

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//vboxes

real x = R.x - r;

real y = R.y - 3*vb;

draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

    y = y - 2*vb;

    A = (x - vb, y - vb);

    B = (x + vb, y - vb);

    C = (x + vb, y+vb);

    D = (x - vb, y + vb);

    y = y - vb;

          filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

[/asy]

\end{minipage}

&

\begin{minipage}{5cm}

\vspace{2mm}

\begin{center}\textbf{A}\end{center}

\vspace{2mm}

[asy]

unitsize(0.3cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 2, vboxes = 2;

real hmass = 1.0, vmass = 0.6;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta = 0;

pair A, B, C, D;

pair Z, X, Y, M, N;

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 3.5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta);

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, 3*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+2bp);

//filldraw((0,-hb)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)-(0, 5*vboxes*vb)--(0,B.y-5*vboxes*vb)--cycle,gray);

path box;

//hboxes

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + hb*Cos(theta),-(x + hb*Cos(theta))*Sin(theta))--(x,y - x*Sin(theta)),black+1bp);

    x = x + 2*hb*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + +0.03 + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = (x + hb)*Cos(theta);

}

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d = vb;

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//vboxes

real x = R.x - r;

real y = R.y - 3*vb;

draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

    y = y - 2*vb;

    A = (x - vb, y - vb);

    B = (x + vb, y - vb);

    C = (x + vb, y+vb);

    D = (x - vb, y + vb);

    y = y - vb;

          filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

[/asy]

\end{minipage}\\

\hline

\begin{minipage}{5cm}

\vspace{2mm}

\begin{center}\textbf{A}\end{center}

\vspace{2mm}

[asy]

unitsize(0.3cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 1, vboxes = 3;

real hmass = 1.0, vmass = 0.6;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta =20;

pair A, B, C, D;

pair Z, X, Y, M, N;

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 3.5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta);

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, 3*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+2bp);

//filldraw((0,-hb)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)-(0, 5*vboxes*vb)--(0,B.y-5*vboxes*vb)--cycle,gray);

path box;

//hboxes

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + hb*Cos(theta),-(x + hb*Cos(theta))*Sin(theta))--(x,y - x*Sin(theta)),black+1bp);

    x = x + 2*hb*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + +0.03 + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = (x + hb)*Cos(theta);

}

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d = vb;

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//vboxes

real x = R.x - r;

real y = R.y - 3*vb;

draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

    y = y - 2*vb;

    A = (x - vb, y - vb);

    B = (x + vb, y - vb);

    C = (x + vb, y+vb);

    D = (x - vb, y + vb);

    y = y - vb;

          filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

[/asy]

\end{minipage}

&

\begin{minipage}{5cm}

\vspace{2mm}

\begin{center}\textbf{A}\end{center}

\vspace{2mm}

[asy]

unitsize(0.3 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

real x = 0, y = 0, hboxes = 3, vboxes = 4;

real hmass = 0.6, vmass = 1;

real hb = 1*hmass, vb = 1*vmass, theta = 0;

pair A, B, C, D;

pair Z, X, Y, M, N;

pair O = (0, 0);

//ground

real L = 3.5*hboxes*hb*Cos(theta);

Y = (0,-hb);

Z = (0, Y.y -L*Sin(theta));

X = (L*Cos(theta),Y.y-L*Sin(theta));

M = Z - (0, 3*vb*vboxes*Cos(theta));

N = (X.x,M.y);

filldraw(Z--X--Y--cycle,gray);

filldraw(M--N--X--Z--cycle,gray);

draw(Z--X,gray+2bp);

//filldraw((0,-hb)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)--B+(hboxes*hb,0)-(0, 5*vboxes*vb)--(0,B.y-5*vboxes*vb)--cycle,gray);

path box;

//hboxes

for (int i = 0; i < hboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x + hb*Cos(theta),-(x + hb*Cos(theta))*Sin(theta))--(x,y - x*Sin(theta)),black+1bp);

    x = x + 2*hb*Cos(theta);

    A = (x - hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    B = (x + hb, y + 0.03 - hb);

    C = (x + hb, y + 0.03 + hb);

    D = (x - hb, y + +0.03 + hb);

    box = A--B--C--D--cycle;

    filldraw(rotate(-theta)*box,lightgray);

    x = (x + hb)*Cos(theta);

}

//pulley

real r = hb/2;

real d = vb;

real alpha = atan((2*d-r)/r);

real l = (2*d - r)/Cos(alpha);

pair R = (-2*d+r, -r + l*Sin(theta));

filldraw(circle(R,r),gray);

draw(R+(r*Sin(theta),r*Cos(theta))--O,black+1bp);

draw(R--(0,-hb),black+2bp);

//vboxes

real x = R.x - r;

real y = R.y - 3*vb;

draw((x,y)--(x, R.y),black+1bp);

for (int i = 0; i < vboxes; i = i+1){

    draw((x,y - vb)--(x,y),black+1bp);

    y = y - 2*vb;

    A = (x - vb, y - vb);

    B = (x + vb, y - vb);

    C = (x + vb, y+vb);

    D = (x - vb, y + vb);

    y = y - vb;

          filldraw(A--B--C--D--cycle, lightgray);

}

[/asy]

\end{minipage}\\

\hline

\end{tabular}

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

int ls = 1;

real ll = 1.2;

int a = 0;

int b = 0;

filldraw((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle,lightgray);

label("$M$",(a - ls*3/4, b + ls/2),E);

//ground

draw((a - 3*ls, b)--(b + ls, b), black+2bp);

draw((a - 3*ls, b)--(a - 3*ls, b + ls), black+2bp);

//draw((a - 3*ls, b + ls/2)--(a - ls, b + ls /2), black);

draw((a, b + ls/2)--(a + ls, b + ls /2), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

label("$F$",(a + ls, b + ls/2),E);

//Spring

int sf = 4;

real sx = a - 3*ls, sy = b+ls/2, l = 2*ls, theta = 0, phi = 80, springl = l/3, dl = 2*springl/sf;

pair P, P1, P2, S1, S2, S3, S4;

P = (sx + l*Cos(theta), sy + l*Sin(theta));

P1 = interp((sx, sy), P,springl);

P2 = interp((sx, sy), P1,springl*3/4);

draw((sx,sy)--P2);

int osc = -1;

S1 = P2;

for (int j = 0; j < sf; j = j + 1){

        S3 = (S1.x+ dl*Cos(theta + phi), S1.y + dl*Sin(-theta + phi));

    draw(S1--S3);

    S4 = (reflect(P1, P2)*S3) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), 0);

    draw(S3--S4);

    S1 = (reflect(P, P1)*S4) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), dl*Sin(theta - phi));

    draw(S4--S1);

    }

draw(S1--P);

[/asy]

//Spring adjustable by angle

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

int l = 2;

real ll = 1.2;

int a = 0;

int b = 0;

int sf = 5;

real sx = 0, sy = 0,  theta = 30, phi = 75, springl = l/3, dl = springl/(sf);

pair P, P1, P2, S1, S2, S3, S4;

P = (sx + l*Cos(theta), sy + l*Sin(theta));

P1 = interp((sx, sy), P,springl);

P2 = interp((sx, sy), P1,springl*3/4);

draw((sx,sy)--P2);

int osc = -1;

S1 = P2;

for (int j = 0; j < sf; j = j + 1){

        S3 = (S1.x+ dl*Cos(theta + phi), S1.y + dl*Sin(-theta + phi));

    draw(S1--S3);

    S4 = (reflect(P1, P2)*S3) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), 0);

    draw(S3--S4);

    S1 = (reflect(P, P1)*S4) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), dl*Sin(theta - phi));

    draw(S4--S1);

    }

draw(S1--P);

[/asy]

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

int ls = 1;

real ll = 1.2;

int a = 0;

int b = 0;

filldraw((a,b)--(a, b + ls)--(a - ls, b + ls)--(a - ls, b)--cycle,lightgray);

label("$M$",(a - ls*3/4, b + ls/2),E);

//ground

draw((a - 3*ls, b)--(b + ls, b), black+2bp);

draw((a - 3*ls, b)--(a - 3*ls, b + ls), black+2bp);

//draw((a - 3*ls, b + ls/2)--(a - ls, b + ls /2), black);

draw((a, b + ls/2)--(a + ls, b + ls/2), black+1bp, EndArrow(8));

label("$F$",(a + ls, b + ls/2),E);

//Spring compressed

int sf = 4;

real sx = a - 3*ls, sy = b+ls/2, l = 2*ls, theta = 0, phi = 75, springl = l/3, dl = 1.1*springl/sf;

pair P, P1, P2, S1, S2, S3, S4;

P = (sx + l*Cos(theta), sy + l*Sin(theta));

P1 = interp((sx, sy), P,springl);

P2 = interp((sx, sy), P1,springl*3/4);

draw((sx,sy)--P2);

int osc = -1;

S1 = P2;

for (int j = 0; j < sf; j = j + 1){

        S3 = (S1.x+ dl*Cos(theta + phi), S1.y + dl*Sin(-theta + phi));

    draw(S1--S3);

    S4 = (reflect(P1, P2)*S3) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), 0);

    draw(S3--S4);

    S1 = (reflect(P, P1)*S4) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), dl*Sin(theta - phi));

    draw(S4--S1);

    }

draw(S1--P);

draw(S1--(S1 + (0, -ls/2 + 1.6*ls)), dashed);

//spring uncompressed

sf = 4;

real sx = a - 3*ls, sy = b+1.6*ls, l = 2*ls, theta = 0, phi = 65, springl = l/3, dl = springl/sf;

P = (sx + l*Cos(theta) + 0.6, sy + l*Sin(theta));

P1 = interp((sx, sy), P,springl/2);

P2 = interp((sx, sy) + 0.3, P1,springl);

draw((sx,sy)--P2);

S1 = P2;

for (int j = 0; j < sf; j = j + 1){

        S3 = (S1.x+ dl*Cos(theta + phi), S1.y + dl*Sin(-theta + phi));

    draw(S1--S3);

    S4 = (reflect(P1, P2)*S3) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), 0);

    draw(S3--S4);

    S1 = (reflect(P, P1)*S4) + (dl*Cos(theta - phi), dl*Sin(theta - phi));

    draw(S4--S1);

    }

draw(S1--(P-(0.45, 0)));

draw(S1--(S1 + (0, +ls/2 - 1.6*ls)), dashed);

label("$\Delta L$",S1 + (-0.1, +ls/2 - 1.6*ls),S);

[/asy]

//ramp with spring boxes, not too adjustable without trouble

[asy]

unitsize(1.5 cm);

defaultpen(fontsize(12pt));

//L = length of slope

//l = distance between box and foot of slope

//theta = angle of slope

//s = side length of box

real L = 5, l = 2.5, theta = 36, s = 0.5;

//A = foot of slope

//B = slope vertex with right angle

//C = peak of slope

//X = Box corner lowest on slope

//W, X, Y, Z = Box corners (listed in clockwise order)

pair A, B, C, X, Y, W, Z;

real x = s*Sin(theta);

real y = s*Cos(theta);

A = (L*Cos(theta),0);

B = (0,0);

C = (0,L*Sin(theta));

X = interp(A,C,l/L);

Y = X + (-s*Cos(theta),s*Sin(theta));

W = X + (x,y);

Z = Y + (x,y);

filldraw(A--B--C--cycle,mediumgray);

label("$36.0^\circ$",A+(-0.75,0),NW);

filldraw(W--X--Y--Z--cycle,heavygray);

label(rotate(-33, (Z))*"$M$",Z + (s/3,0),E);

//Spring system

real wheelsz = s/5;

real disp = 1 + wheelsz;

real ss = s/2;

int springf = 5;

real fl = 0.05;

real dx = 0.045;

pair D, Sstart, Send, N, M;

D = B + (C - B)/2 - (0, ss/2) - (wheelsz, 0);

N = (C + (-wheelsz/disp + dx, 3.5*wheelsz*disp) + (Z + Y)/2)/2;

M = (N + (Z + Y)/2)/2;

Sstart = D + (-ss/2, ss + ss/2);

Send = Sstart + (0,1)*springf*fl;

filldraw(ellipse((C*disp)-(wheelsz,0), wheelsz, wheelsz), gray);

draw((C*disp)-(wheelsz,0)--C);

draw((C+(-wheelsz/disp + dx, 3.5*wheelsz*disp))--(Z+Y)/2);

draw((D+(-ss/2, ss))--Sstart);

draw(Send--((C*disp)+(-2*wheelsz,0)));

int osc = -1;

for (int i = 0; i < springf; i = i + 1)

    draw((Sstart + osc^(i+1)*(1,0)*fl + i*fl*(0,1))--(Sstart + osc^(i)*(1,0)*fl + (i + 1)*fl*(0,1)));

draw(N--M, white+2bp);

real o1 = 0.15;

real o2 = 0.15;

pair p1, p2, p3, p4;

p1 = (N + M)/2;

p2 = (N + p1)/2;

p3 = (p1 + M)/2;

// = ((N + M)/2 + M)/2;

draw(N--(N + (o1,o2))--(p2 - (o2, o1))--(p2 + (o2, o1))--(p1 - (o1,o2))--(p1 + (o1,o2))--(p3 - (o2, o1))--(p3 + (o2, o1))--M);

//Second box

filldraw(D--(D+(-ss, 0))--(D+(-ss, ss))--(D+(0, ss))--cycle, heavygray);

label("$A$",D+(-3*ss, ss/2),E);

[/asy]

Coil Spring

https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/fgraxsjw

[asy]

//theta = Angle of axis (relative to vertical)

//D = diameter of spring

//L = length of spring

//N = number of coils

//r = ratio of major/minor axes in ellipse

//A = location of spring bottom

real theta = 0;

real D = 0.25;

real L = 1;

real N = 15;

real r = 0.5;

pair A = (0,0);

real spacing = L/N;

real y = spacing*Cos(theta);

real x = spacing*Sin(theta);

for (int i = 0; i<N; ++i) {

  pair center = A + (i*x,i*y);

  path E = rotate(-theta,center)*ellipse(center,D,r*D);

  draw(E);

}

[/asy]
